sglang.author: glenliu21

sglang.title: fix(ci): rate limit and permission errors in trace publishing
sglang.author: alisonshao
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Fix nightly trace publishing to correctly identify permission errors vs rate limit errors.
Previously all 403 errors were silently skipped as "rate limits", masking the actual issue: the GH_PAT_FOR_NIGHTLY_CI_DATA token lacks write permission to sglang-bot/sglang-ci-data.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix GLM-ASR audio encoder RoPE dim
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose

Fix #32445
GLM-ASR audio encoder's RoPE should be half rotary.
This issue only occured in native code path, because vllm_flash_attn triton RoPE will always allocate q_rot/k_rot based on cos/sin's last dim.

vllm.title: [BUGFIX]  Fix degenerate strides in TRTLLM query tensors for FlashInfer backend. Fixes issue #32353
vllm.author: vadiklyutiy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR fixes an issue #32353 with degenerate strides in query tensors when using the TRTLLM kernels in the FlashInfer attention backend. The .contiguous() call alone doesn't fix degenerate strides when a dimension has size 1, which can cause issues with kernel execution.
